title: T-005 — grns + grn_items table migration
prompt:
# T-005 — grns + grn_items table migration

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §5.5, §7.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Create `grns` (header) and `grn_items` (multi-LP per line per Q1) tables per PRD §5.5.

## Implementation contract
Add `packages/db/src/schema/grns.ts` with both tables.
- grns: id, tenant_id, grn_number (varchar 32 UNIQUE per tenant), source_type ENUM ('po','to','return','adjustment_in'), po_id, to_id, asn_id, supplier_id, receipt_date, warehouse_id, default_location_id, status ENUM ('draft','completed','cancelled') default 'draft', received_by, notes, ext_jsonb, private_jsonb, audit cols.
- grn_items: id, tenant_id, grn_id FK, line_number INT, product_id, po_line_id, to_line_id, ordered_qty, received_qty, uom, batch_number (nullable), supplier_batch_number, gtin, catch_weight_kg, manufacture_date, expiry_date, pallet_id, location_id, qa_status_initial ENUM, lp_id (nullable, populated post-complete).
Constraints: UNIQUE(tenant_id, grn_number); CHECK received_qty >= 0; CHECK (line_number > 0); FK grn_id ON DELETE CASCADE.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/src/schema/grns.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0NN_grns.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/grns.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the migration runs, when both tables are inspected, then all PRD §5.5 columns are present.
2. Given a GRN row with two grn_items rows for the same po_line_id (multi-LP per line per Q1), when committed, then both items persist (no spurious uniqueness blocks).
3. Given grn_items.received_qty=-1, when committed, then DB raises a CHECK violation.

## Test strategy
- RED: grns.test.ts covers multi-row-per-line and CHECK violation.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test grns`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not introduce UNIQUE(grn_id, po_line_id) — multi-LP per line is a hard requirement (Q1).
- Do not auto-set status to 'completed' (manual complete per baseline D12).
- Do not implement service logic.

pipeline_inputs.description: Create grns and grn_items tables with multi-LP-per-line support per Q1 baseline D12.
pipeline_inputs.details: Drizzle schemas + migration. grn_items.lp_id nullable, populated post-complete. Multi rows per (grn_id, po_line_id) explicitly allowed. Status defaults 'draft'. RLS deferred to T-012.
out_of_scope: Indexes beyond those needed for FK (deferred T-011)
acceptance_criteria: Given the migration runs, when both grns and grn_items are inspected, then PRD §5.5 columns exist with declared types
Given a GRN with two grn_items rows for the same po_line_id, when committed, then both rows persist
Given grn_items.received_qty=-1, when committed, then DB raises a CHECK violation
test_strategy: RED: grns.test.ts covers multi-row-per-line allowed and CHECK violation
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test grns'
